# Lease


## Properties

Name | Type | Description | Notes
------------ | ------------- | ------------- | -------------
**description** | **string** | Description or reason for the Lease. | [optional] [default to undefined]
**expires_at** | **number** | ExpiresAt is the unix timestamp in UTC to denote when the Lease will no longer be valid. | [optional] [default to undefined]
**nonce** | **string** | Nonce is the unique ID autogenerated and associated with the Lease. | [optional] [default to undefined]
**owner** | **string** | Owner is the user identifier which acquired the Lease. | [optional] [default to undefined]
**version** | **string** | Machine version | [optional] [default to undefined]
